skills.name: adaptyv
skills.desc_en: Cloud laboratory platform for automated protein testing and validation. Use when designing proteins and needing experimental validation including binding assays, expression testing, thermostability measurements, enzyme activity assays, or protein sequence optimization. Also use for submitting experiments via API, tracking experiment status, downloading results, optimizing protein sequences for better expression using computational tools (NetSolP, SoluProt, SolubleMPNN, ESM), or managing protein design workflows with wet-lab validation.
skills.desc_zh: 自動化蛋白質測試和驗證的雲實驗室平台，適用於設計蛋白質並需要實驗驗證，包括結合測試、表達測試、熱穩定性測量、酶活性測試或蛋白質序列優化。

skills.name: aeon
skills.desc_en: This skill should be used for time series machine learning tasks including classification, regression, clustering, forecasting, anomaly detection, segmentation, and similarity search. Use when working with temporal data, sequential patterns, or time-indexed observations requiring specialized algorithms beyond standard ML approaches. Particularly suited for univariate and multivariate time series analysis with scikit-learn compatible APIs.
skills.desc_zh: 此技能應用於時間序列機器學習任務，包括分類、回歸、聚類、預測、異常檢測、分割和相似性搜索。

skills.name: alpha-vantage
skills.desc_en: Access real-time and historical stock market data, forex rates, cryptocurrency prices, commodities, economic indicators, and 50+ technical indicators via the Alpha Vantage API. Use when fetching stock prices (OHLCV), company fundamentals (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow), earnings, options data, market news/sentiment, insider transactions, GDP, CPI, treasury yields, gold/silver/oil prices, Bitcoin/crypto prices, forex exchange rates, or calculating technical indicators (SMA, EMA, MACD, RSI, Bollinger Bands). Requires a free API key from alphavantage.co.
skills.desc_zh: 通過 Alpha Vantage API 訪問實時和歷史股市數據、外匯匯率、加密貨幣價格、商品、經濟指標和 50 多種技術指標。

skills.name: alphafold-database
skills.desc_en: Access AlphaFold 200M+ AI-predicted protein structures. Retrieve structures by UniProt ID, download PDB/mmCIF files, analyze confidence metrics (pLDDT, PAE), for drug discovery and structural biology.
skills.desc_zh: 訪問 AlphaFold 200M+ AI 預測的蛋白質結構，通過 UniProt ID 檢索結構，下載 PDB/mmCIF 文件，分析信心指標（pLDDT, PAE），用於藥物發現和結構生物學。

skills.name: anndata
skills.desc_en: Data structure for annotated matrices in single-cell analysis. Use when working with .h5ad files or integrating with the scverse ecosystem. This is the data format skill—for analysis workflows use scanpy; for probabilistic models use scvi-tools; for population-scale queries use cellxgene-census.
skills.desc_zh: 單細胞分析中帶註釋矩陣的數據結構，適用於處理 .h5ad 文件或與 scverse 生態系統集成。

skills.name: arboreto
skills.desc_en: Infer gene regulatory networks (GRNs) from gene expression data using scalable algorithms (GRNBoost2, GENIE3). Use when analyzing transcriptomics data (bulk RNA-seq, single-cell RNA-seq) to identify transcription factor-target gene relationships and regulatory interactions. Supports distributed computation for large-scale datasets.
skills.desc_zh: 使用可擴展算法（GRNBoost2, GENIE3）從基因表達數據推斷基因調控網絡（GRNs）。

skills.name: astropy
skills.desc_en: Comprehensive Python library for astronomy and astrophysics. This skill should be used when working with astronomical data including celestial coordinates, physical units, FITS files, cosmological calculations, time systems, tables, world coordinate systems (WCS), and astronomical data analysis. Use when tasks involve coordinate transformations, unit conversions, FITS file manipulation, cosmological distance calculations, time scale conversions, or astronomical data processing.
skills.desc_zh: 全面的 Python 天文學和天體物理學庫，適用於處理天文數據，包括天體坐標、物理單位、FITS 文件、宇宙學計算等。

skills.name: benchling-integration
skills.desc_en: Benchling R&D platform integration. Access registry (DNA, proteins), inventory, ELN entries, workflows via API, build Benchling Apps, query Data Warehouse, for lab data management automation.
skills.desc_zh: Benchling 研發平台集成，通過 API 訪問登記（DNA、蛋白質）、庫存、ELN 條目和工作流程。

skills.name: bgpt-paper-search
skills.desc_en: Search scientific papers and retrieve structured experimental data extracted from full-text studies via the BGPT MCP server. Returns 25+ fields per paper including methods, results, sample sizes, quality scores, and conclusions. Use for literature reviews, evidence synthesis, and finding experimental details not available in abstracts alone.
skills.desc_zh: 搜索科學論文並通過 BGPT MCP 伺服器檢索從全文研究中提取的結構化實驗數據。

skills.name: bindingdb-database
skills.desc_en: Query BindingDB for measured drug-target binding affinities (Ki, Kd, IC50, EC50). Search by target (UniProt ID), compound (SMILES/name), or pathogen. Essential for drug discovery, lead optimization, polypharmacology analysis, and structure-activity relationship (SAR) studies.
skills.desc_zh: 查詢 BindingDB 以獲取測量的藥物-靶標結合親和力（Ki, Kd, IC50, EC50）。

skills.name: biopython
skills.desc_en: Comprehensive molecular biology toolkit. Use for sequence manipulation, file parsing (FASTA/GenBank/PDB), phylogenetics, and programmatic NCBI/PubMed access (Bio.Entrez). Best for batch processing, custom bioinformatics pipelines, BLAST automation. For quick lookups use gget; for multi-service integration use bioservices.
skills.desc_zh: 全面的分子生物學工具包，適用於序列操作、文件解析（FASTA/GenBank/PDB）、系統發生學等。

skills.name: biorxiv-database
skills.desc_en: Efficient database search tool for bioRxiv preprint server. Use this skill when searching for life sciences preprints by keywords, authors, date ranges, or categories, retrieving paper metadata, downloading PDFs, or conducting literature reviews.
skills.desc_zh: 高效的數據庫搜索工具，用於 bioRxiv 預印本伺服器，適合按關鍵字、作者、日期範圍或類別搜索生命科學預印本。

skills.name: bioservices
skills.desc_en: Unified Python interface to 40+ bioinformatics services. Use when querying multiple databases (UniProt, KEGG, ChEMBL, Reactome) in a single workflow with consistent API. Best for cross-database analysis, ID mapping across services. For quick single-database lookups use gget; for sequence/file manipulation use biopython.
skills.desc_zh: 統一的 Python 接口，連接 40 多個生物信息學服務，適用於在單一工作流程中查詢多個數據庫。

skills.name: brenda-database
skills.desc_en: Access BRENDA enzyme database via SOAP API. Retrieve kinetic parameters (Km, kcat), reaction equations, organism data, and substrate-specific enzyme information for biochemical research and metabolic pathway analysis.
skills.desc_zh: 通過 SOAP API 訪問 BRENDA 酶數據庫，檢索動力學參數、反應方程和底物特異性酶信息。

skills.name: cbioportal-database
skills.desc_en: Query cBioPortal for cancer genomics data including somatic mutations, copy number alterations, gene expression, and survival data across hundreds of cancer studies. Essential for cancer target validation, oncogene/tumor suppressor analysis, and patient-level genomic profiling.
skills.desc_zh: 查詢 cBioPortal 獲取癌症基因組數據，包括體細胞突變、拷貝數變化、基因表達和生存數據。

skills.name: cellxgene-census
skills.desc_en: Query the CELLxGENE Census (61M+ cells) programmatically. Use when you need expression data across tissues, diseases, or cell types from the largest curated single-cell atlas. Best for population-scale queries, reference atlas comparisons. For analyzing your own data use scanpy or scvi-tools.
skills.desc_zh: 以編程方式查詢 CELLxGENE Census（61M+ 細胞），適用於需要跨組織、疾病或細胞類型的表達數據。

skills.name: chembl-database
skills.desc_en: Query ChEMBL bioactive molecules and drug discovery data. Search compounds by structure/properties, retrieve bioactivity data (IC50, Ki), find inhibitors, perform SAR studies, for medicinal chemistry.
skills.desc_zh: 查詢 ChEMBL 生物活性分子和藥物發現數據，按結構/屬性搜索化合物。

skills.name: cirq
skills.desc_en: Google quantum computing framework. Use when targeting Google Quantum AI hardware, designing noise-aware circuits, or running quantum characterization experiments. Best for Google hardware, noise modeling, and low-level circuit design. For IBM hardware use qiskit; for quantum ML with autodiff use pennylane; for physics simulations use qutip.
skills.desc_zh: Google 量子計算框架，適用於針對 Google 量子 AI 硬體設計噪聲感知電路或運行量子特徵實驗。

skills.name: citation-management
skills.desc_en: Comprehensive citation management for academic research. Search Google Scholar and PubMed for papers, extract accurate metadata, validate citations, and generate properly formatted BibTeX entries. This skill should be used when you need to find papers, verify citation information, convert DOIs to BibTeX, or ensure reference accuracy in scientific writing.
skills.desc_zh: 全面的學術研究引用管理工具，適用於搜索 Google Scholar 和 PubMed 的論文，提取準確的元數據。

skills.name: clinical-decision-support
skills.desc_en: Generate professional clinical decision support (CDS) documents for pharmaceutical and clinical research settings, including patient cohort analyses (biomarker-stratified with outcomes) and treatment recommendation reports (evidence-based guidelines with decision algorithms). Supports GRADE evidence grading, statistical analysis (hazard ratios, survival curves, waterfall plots), biomarker integration, and regulatory compliance. Outputs publication-ready LaTeX/PDF format optimized for drug development, clinical research, and evidence synthesis.
skills.desc_zh: 生成專業的臨床決策支持（CDS）文件，適用於藥物和臨床研究環境，包括患者隊列分析和治療建議報告。

skills.name: clinical-reports
skills.desc_en: Write comprehensive clinical reports including case reports (CARE guidelines), diagnostic reports (radiology/pathology/lab), clinical trial reports (ICH-E3, SAE, CSR), and patient documentation (SOAP, H&P, discharge summaries). Full support with templates, regulatory compliance (HIPAA, FDA, ICH-GCP), and validation tools.
skills.desc_zh: 撰寫全面的臨床報告，包括病例報告、診斷報告和臨床試驗報告。

skills.name: clinicaltrials-database
skills.desc_en: Query ClinicalTrials.gov via API v2. Search trials by condition, drug, location, status, or phase. Retrieve trial details by NCT ID, export data, for clinical research and patient matching.
skills.desc_zh: 通過 API v2 查詢 ClinicalTrials.gov，按條件、藥物、地點、狀態或階段搜索試驗。

skills.name: clinpgx-database
skills.desc_en: Access ClinPGx pharmacogenomics data (successor to PharmGKB). Query gene-drug interactions, CPIC guidelines, allele functions, for precision medicine and genotype-guided dosing decisions.
skills.desc_zh: 訪問 ClinPGx 藥物基因組學數據，查詢基因-藥物相互作用和 CPIC 指導方針。

skills.name: clinvar-database
skills.desc_en: Query NCBI ClinVar for variant clinical significance. Search by gene/position, interpret pathogenicity classifications, access via E-utilities API or FTP, annotate VCFs, for genomic medicine.
skills.desc_zh: 查詢 NCBI ClinVar 獲取變異臨床意義，按基因/位置搜索，解釋致病性分類。

skills.name: cobrapy
skills.desc_en: Constraint-based metabolic modeling (COBRA). FBA, FVA, gene knockouts, flux sampling, SBML models, for systems biology and metabolic engineering analysis.
skills.desc_zh: 基於約束的代謝建模（COBRA），適用於系統生物學和代謝工程分析。

skills.name: consciousness-council
skills.desc_en: Run a multi-perspective Mind Council deliberation on any question, decision, or creative challenge. Use this skill whenever the user wants diverse viewpoints, needs help making a tough decision, asks for a council/panel/board discussion, wants to explore a problem from multiple angles, requests devil's advocate analysis, or says things like "what would different experts think about this", "help me think through this from all sides", "council mode", "mind council", or "deliberate on this". Also trigger when the user faces a dilemma, trade-off, or complex choice with no obvious answer.
skills.desc_zh: 就任何問題、決策或創意挑戰進行多角度的心智委員會討論。

skills.name: cosmic-database
skills.desc_en: Access COSMIC cancer mutation database. Query somatic mutations, Cancer Gene Census, mutational signatures, gene fusions, for cancer research and precision oncology. Requires authentication.
skills.desc_zh: 訪問 COSMIC 癌症突變數據庫，查詢體細胞突變、癌症基因普查和突變特徵。

skills.name: dask
skills.desc_en: Distributed computing for larger-than-RAM pandas/NumPy workflows. Use when you need to scale existing pandas/NumPy code beyond memory or across clusters. Best for parallel file processing, distributed ML, integration with existing pandas code. For out-of-core analytics on single machine use vaex; for in-memory speed use polars.
skills.desc_zh: 用於超出 RAM 的 pandas/NumPy 工作流程的分佈式計算，適合擴展現有的 pandas/NumPy 代碼。

skills.name: datacommons-client
skills.desc_en: Work with Data Commons, a platform providing programmatic access to public statistical data from global sources. Use this skill when working with demographic data, economic indicators, health statistics, environmental data, or any public datasets available through Data Commons. Applicable for querying population statistics, GDP figures, unemployment rates, disease prevalence, geographic entity resolution, and exploring relationships between statistical entities.
skills.desc_zh: 使用 Data Commons，這是一個提供全球公共統計數據的編程訪問平台。

skills.name: datamol
skills.desc_en: Pythonic wrapper around RDKit with simplified interface and sensible defaults. Preferred for standard drug discovery including SMILES parsing, standardization, descriptors, fingerprints, clustering, 3D conformers, parallel processing. Returns native rdkit.Chem.Mol objects. For advanced control or custom parameters, use rdkit directly.
skills.desc_zh: RDKit 的 Python 包裝器，提供簡化的接口和合理的默認設置，適合標準藥物發現。

skills.name: deepchem
skills.desc_en: Molecular ML with diverse featurizers and pre-built datasets. Use for property prediction (ADMET, toxicity) with traditional ML or GNNs when you want extensive featurization options and MoleculeNet benchmarks. Best for quick experiments with pre-trained models, diverse molecular representations. For graph-first PyTorch workflows use torchdrug; for benchmark datasets use pytdc.
skills.desc_zh: 分子機器學習，具有多樣的特徵化工具和預建數據集。用於屬性預測（ADMET、毒性），當您需要廣泛的特徵化選項和MoleculeNet基準時，適合快速實驗和多樣的分子表示。

skills.name: deeptools
skills.desc_en: NGS analysis toolkit. BAM to bigWig conversion, QC (correlation, PCA, fingerprints), heatmaps/profiles (TSS, peaks), for ChIP-seq, RNA-seq, ATAC-seq visualization.
skills.desc_zh: NGS分析工具包。BAM轉換為bigWig，質量控制（相關性、PCA、指紋），熱圖/輪廓（TSS、峰值），用於ChIP-seq、RNA-seq、ATAC-seq的可視化。

skills.name: denario
skills.desc_en: Multiagent AI system for scientific research assistance that automates research workflows from data analysis to publication. This skill should be used when generating research ideas from datasets, developing research methodologies, executing computational experiments, performing literature searches, or generating publication-ready papers in LaTeX format. Supports end-to-end research pipelines with customizable agent orchestration.
skills.desc_zh: 多代理AI系統，用於科學研究協助，自動化從數據分析到出版的研究工作流程。當生成研究想法、開發研究方法、執行計算實驗、進行文獻搜索或生成LaTeX格式的出版物時，應使用此技能。

skills.name: depmap
skills.desc_en: Query the Cancer Dependency Map (DepMap) for cancer cell line gene dependency scores (CRISPR Chronos), drug sensitivity data, and gene effect profiles. Use for identifying cancer-specific vulnerabilities, synthetic lethal interactions, and validating oncology drug targets.
skills.desc_zh: 查詢癌症依賴圖（DepMap）以獲取癌細胞系基因依賴分數（CRISPR Chronos）、藥物敏感性數據和基因效應概況。用於識別癌症特異性脆弱性、合成致死相互作用和驗證腫瘤藥物靶點。

skills.name: dhdna-profiler
skills.desc_en: Extract cognitive patterns and thinking fingerprints from any text. Use this skill when the user wants to analyze how someone thinks, understand cognitive style, profile writing or speech patterns, compare thinking styles between people, asks "what's my thinking style", "analyze how this person reasons", "cognitive profile", "thinking pattern", "DHDNA", "digital DNA", or wants to understand the mind behind any text. Also trigger when the user provides text and wants deeper insight into the author's reasoning patterns, decision-making style, or cognitive signature.
skills.desc_zh: 從任何文本中提取認知模式和思維指紋。當用戶想分析某人的思維方式、理解認知風格、分析寫作或演講模式時，應使用此技能。

skills.name: diffdock
skills.desc_en: Diffusion-based molecular docking. Predict protein-ligand binding poses from PDB/SMILES, confidence scores, virtual screening, for structure-based drug design. Not for affinity prediction.
skills.desc_zh: 基於擴散的分子對接。從PDB/SMILES預測蛋白質-配體結合姿勢、置信度分數、虛擬篩選，用於結構基礎的藥物設計。

skills.name: dnanexus-integration
skills.desc_en: DNAnexus cloud genomics platform. Build apps/applets, manage data (upload/download), dxpy Python SDK, run workflows, FASTQ/BAM/VCF, for genomics pipeline development and execution.
skills.desc_zh: DNAnexus雲基因組平台。構建應用程序/小程序，管理數據（上傳/下載），dxpy Python SDK，運行工作流程，FASTQ/BAM/VCF，用於基因組管道的開發和執行。

skills.name: docx
skills.desc_en: "Use this skill whenever the user wants to create, read, edit, or manipulate Word documents (.docx files). Triggers include: any mention of 'Word doc', 'word document', '.docx', or requests to produce professional documents with formatting like tables of contents, headings, page numbers, or letterheads. Also use when extracting or reorganizing content from .docx files, inserting or replacing images in documents, performing find-and-replace in Word files, working with tracked changes or comments, or converting content into a polished Word document. If the user asks for a 'report', 'memo', 'letter', 'template', or similar deliverable as a Word or .docx file, use this skill. Do NOT use for PDFs, spreadsheets, Google Docs, or general coding tasks unrelated to document generation."
skills.desc_zh: 當用戶想創建、閱讀、編輯或操作Word文檔（.docx文件）時，應使用此技能。觸發條件包括提到'Word doc'、'word document'、'.docx'或請求生成專業文檔。

skills.name: drugbank-database
skills.desc_en: Access and analyze comprehensive drug information from the DrugBank database including drug properties, interactions, targets, pathways, chemical structures, and pharmacology data. This skill should be used when working with pharmaceutical data, drug discovery research, pharmacology studies, drug-drug interaction analysis, target identification, chemical similarity searches, ADMET predictions, or any task requiring detailed drug and drug target information from DrugBank.
skills.desc_zh: 訪問和分析來自DrugBank數據庫的全面藥物信息，包括藥物屬性、相互作用、靶點、途徑、化學結構和藥理數據。

skills.name: edgartools
skills.desc_en: Python library for accessing, analyzing, and extracting data from SEC EDGAR filings. Use when working with SEC filings, financial statements (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow), XBRL financial data, insider trading (Form 4), institutional holdings (13F), company financials, annual/quarterly reports (10-K, 10-Q), proxy statements (DEF 14A), 8-K current events, company screening by ticker/CIK/industry, multi-period financial analysis, or any SEC regulatory filings.
skills.desc_zh: Python庫，用於訪問、分析和提取SEC EDGAR文件中的數據。當處理SEC文件、財務報表（損益表、資產負債表、現金流）時，應使用此技能。

skills.name: ena-database
skills.desc_en: Access European Nucleotide Archive via API/FTP. Retrieve DNA/RNA sequences, raw reads (FASTQ), genome assemblies by accession, for genomics and bioinformatics pipelines. Supports multiple formats.
skills.desc_zh: 通過API/FTP訪問歐洲核苷酸檔案。檢索DNA/RNA序列、原始讀數（FASTQ）、按存取號檢索基因組組裝，用於基因組學和生物信息學管道。

skills.name: ensembl-database
skills.desc_en: Query Ensembl genome database REST API for 250+ species. Gene lookups, sequence retrieval, variant analysis, comparative genomics, orthologs, VEP predictions, for genomic research.
skills.desc_zh: 查詢Ensembl基因組數據庫REST API，涵蓋250多個物種。基因查詢、序列檢索、變異分析、比較基因組學、正交基因、VEP預測，用於基因組研究。

skills.name: esm
skills.desc_en: Comprehensive toolkit for protein language models including ESM3 (generative multimodal protein design across sequence, structure, and function) and ESM C (efficient protein embeddings and representations). Use this skill when working with protein sequences, structures, or function prediction; designing novel proteins; generating protein embeddings; performing inverse folding; or conducting protein engineering tasks. Supports both local model usage and cloud-based Forge API for scalable inference.
skills.desc_zh: 全面的蛋白質語言模型工具包，包括ESM3（跨序列、結構和功能的生成多模態蛋白質設計）和ESM C（高效的蛋白質嵌入和表示）。

skills.name: etetoolkit
skills.desc_en: Phylogenetic tree toolkit (ETE). Tree manipulation (Newick/NHX), evolutionary event detection, orthology/paralogy, NCBI taxonomy, visualization (PDF/SVG), for phylogenomics.
skills.desc_zh: 系統發育樹工具包（ETE）。樹操作（Newick/NHX）、進化事件檢測、正交/旁系、NCBI分類法、可視化（PDF/SVG），用於系統發育基因組學。

skills.name: exploratory-data-analysis
skills.desc_en: Perform comprehensive exploratory data analysis on scientific data files across 200+ file formats. This skill should be used when analyzing any scientific data file to understand its structure, content, quality, and characteristics. Automatically detects file type and generates detailed markdown reports with format-specific analysis, quality metrics, and downstream analysis recommendations. Covers chemistry, bioinformatics, microscopy, spectroscopy, proteomics, metabolomics, and general scientific data formats.
skills.desc_zh: 對200多種文件格式的科學數據文件進行全面的探索性數據分析。此技能應用於分析任何科學數據文件，以了解其結構、內容、質量和特徵。

skills.name: fda-database
skills.desc_en: Query openFDA API for drugs, devices, adverse events, recalls, regulatory submissions (510k, PMA), substance identification (UNII), for FDA regulatory data analysis and safety research.
skills.desc_zh: 查詢openFDA API以獲取藥物、設備、不良事件、召回、監管提交（510k、PMA）、物質識別（UNII），用於FDA監管數據分析和安全研究。

skills.name: flowio
skills.desc_en: Parse FCS (Flow Cytometry Standard) files v2.0-3.1. Extract events as NumPy arrays, read metadata/channels, convert to CSV/DataFrame, for flow cytometry data preprocessing.
skills.desc_zh: 解析FCS（流式細胞術標準）文件v2.0-3.1。提取事件為NumPy數組，讀取元數據/通道，轉換為CSV/DataFrame，用於流式細胞術數據預處理。

skills.name: fluidsim
skills.desc_en: Framework for computational fluid dynamics simulations using Python. Use when running fluid dynamics simulations including Navier-Stokes equations (2D/3D), shallow water equations, stratified flows, or when analyzing turbulence, vortex dynamics, or geophysical flows. Provides pseudospectral methods with FFT, HPC support, and comprehensive output analysis.
skills.desc_zh: 使用Python的計算流體動力學模擬框架。用於運行流體動力學模擬，包括Navier-Stokes方程（2D/3D）、淺水方程、分層流，或分析湍流、漩渦動力學或地球物理流。

skills.name: fred-economic-data
skills.desc_en: Query FRED (Federal Reserve Economic Data) API for 800,000+ economic time series from 100+ sources. Access GDP, unemployment, inflation, interest rates, exchange rates, housing, and regional data. Use for macroeconomic analysis, financial research, policy studies, economic forecasting, and academic research requiring U.S. and international economic indicators.

skills.desc_zh: 多目標優化框架，支持NSGA-II、NSGA-III、MOEA/D、Pareto前沿、約束處理、基準測試（ZDT、DTLZ），適用於工程設計和優化問題。

skills.name: pyopenms
skills.desc_en: Complete mass spectrometry analysis platform. Use for proteomics workflows feature detection, peptide identification, protein quantification, and complex LC-MS/MS pipelines. Supports extensive file formats and algorithms. Best for proteomics, comprehensive MS data processing. For simple spectral comparison and metabolite ID use matchms.
skills.desc_zh: 完整的質譜分析平台，適用於蛋白質組學工作流程中的特徵檢測、肽識別、蛋白質定量和複雜的LC-MS/MS管道，支持廣泛的文件格式和算法。最適合蛋白質組學和全面的質譜數據處理。對於簡單的光譜比較和代謝物識別，使用matchms。

skills.name: pysam
skills.desc_en: Genomic file toolkit. Read/write SAM/BAM/CRAM alignments, VCF/BCF variants, FASTA/FASTQ sequences, extract regions, calculate coverage, for NGS data processing pipelines.
skills.desc_zh: 基因組文件工具包，支持讀取/寫入SAM/BAM/CRAM比對、VCF/BCF變異、FASTA/FASTQ序列、提取區域、計算覆蓋度，適用於NGS數據處理管道。

skills.name: pytdc
skills.desc_en: Therapeutics Data Commons. AI-ready drug discovery datasets (ADME, toxicity, DTI), benchmarks, scaffold splits, molecular oracles, for therapeutic ML and pharmacological prediction.
skills.desc_zh: 治療數據共享平台，提供AI準備的藥物發現數據集（ADME、毒性、DTI）、基準測試、骨架拆分、分子預言，適用於治療機器學習和藥理預測。

skills.name: pytorch-lightning
skills.desc_en: Deep learning framework (PyTorch Lightning). Organize PyTorch code into LightningModules, configure Trainers for multi-GPU/TPU, implement data pipelines, callbacks, logging (W&B, TensorBoard), distributed training (DDP, FSDP, DeepSpeed), for scalable neural network training.
skills.desc_zh: 深度學習框架（PyTorch Lightning），組織PyTorch代碼為LightningModules，配置多GPU/TPU的訓練器，實現數據管道、回調、日誌（W&B、TensorBoard）、分佈式訓練（DDP、FSDP、DeepSpeed），適用於可擴展的神經網絡訓練。

skills.name: pyzotero
skills.desc_en: Interact with Zotero reference management libraries using the pyzotero Python client. Retrieve, create, update, and delete items, collections, tags, and attachments via the Zotero Web API v3. Use this skill when working with Zotero libraries programmatically, managing bibliographic references, exporting citations, searching library contents, uploading PDF attachments, or building research automation workflows that integrate with Zotero.
skills.desc_zh: 使用pyzotero Python客戶端與Zotero參考管理庫互動，通過Zotero Web API v3檢索、創建、更新和刪除項目、集合、標籤和附件。當以編程方式處理Zotero庫、管理文獻參考、導出引用、搜索庫內容、上傳PDF附件或構建與Zotero集成的研究自動化工作流程時使用此技能。

skills.name: qiskit
skills.desc_en: IBM quantum computing framework. Use when targeting IBM Quantum hardware, working with Qiskit Runtime for production workloads, or needing IBM optimization tools. Best for IBM hardware execution, quantum error mitigation, and enterprise quantum computing. For Google hardware use cirq; for gradient-based quantum ML use pennylane; for open quantum system simulations use qutip.
skills.desc_zh: IBM量子計算框架，當目標為IBM量子硬體、使用Qiskit Runtime處理生產工作負載或需要IBM優化工具時使用。最適合IBM硬體執行、量子錯誤緩解和企業量子計算。對於Google硬體，使用cirq；對於基於梯度的量子機器學習，使用pennylane；對於開放量子系統模擬，使用qutip。

skills.name: qutip
skills.desc_en: Quantum physics simulation library for open quantum systems. Use when studying master equations, Lindblad dynamics, decoherence, quantum optics, or cavity QED. Best for physics research, open system dynamics, and educational simulations. NOT for circuit-based quantum computing—use qiskit, cirq, or pennylane for quantum algorithms and hardware execution.
skills.desc_zh: 開放量子系統的量子物理模擬庫，當研究主方程、Lindblad動力學、去相干、量子光學或腔量子電動力學時使用。最適合物理研究、開放系統動力學和教育模擬。不適用於基於電路的量子計算——對於量子算法和硬體執行，使用qiskit、cirq或pennylane。

skills.name: rdkit
skills.desc_en: Cheminformatics toolkit for fine-grained molecular control. SMILES/SDF parsing, descriptors (MW, LogP, TPSA), fingerprints, substructure search, 2D/3D generation, similarity, reactions. For standard workflows with simpler interface, use datamol (wrapper around RDKit). Use rdkit for advanced control, custom sanitization, specialized algorithms.
skills.desc_zh: 用於精細分子控制的化學信息學工具包，支持SMILES/SDF解析、描述符（MW、LogP、TPSA）、指紋、子結構搜索、2D/3D生成、相似性、反應。對於標準工作流程，使用datamol（RDKit的包裝器）以簡化界面。使用rdkit進行高級控制、自定義清理和專用算法。

skills.name: reactome-database
skills.desc_en: Query Reactome REST API for pathway analysis, enrichment, gene-pathway mapping, disease pathways, molecular interactions, expression analysis, for systems biology studies.
skills.desc_zh: 查詢Reactome REST API以進行通路分析、富集、基因-通路映射、疾病通路、分子互動、表達分析，適用於系統生物學研究。

skills.name: research-grants
skills.desc_en: Write competitive research proposals for NSF, NIH, DOE, DARPA, and Taiwan NSTC. Agency-specific formatting, review criteria, budget preparation, broader impacts, significance statements, innovation narratives, and compliance with submission requirements.
skills.desc_zh: 撰寫競爭性研究提案，針對NSF、NIH、DOE、DARPA和台灣NSTC，包含機構特定格式、審查標準、預算準備、更廣泛的影響、重要性聲明、創新敘述和遵守提交要求。

skills.name: research-lookup
skills.desc_en: Look up current research information using the Parallel Chat API (primary) or Perplexity sonar-pro-search (academic paper searches). Automatically routes queries to the best backend. Use for finding papers, gathering research data, and verifying scientific information.
skills.desc_zh: 使用Parallel Chat API（主要）或Perplexity sonar-pro-search（學術論文搜索）查找當前研究信息，自動將查詢路由到最佳後端。用於查找論文、收集研究數據和驗證科學信息。

skills.name: rowan
skills.desc_en: Cloud-based quantum chemistry platform with Python API. Preferred for computational chemistry workflows including pKa prediction, geometry optimization, conformer searching, molecular property calculations, protein-ligand docking (AutoDock Vina), and AI protein cofolding (Chai-1, Boltz-1/2). Use when tasks involve quantum chemistry calculations, molecular property prediction, DFT or semiempirical methods, neural network potentials (AIMNet2), protein-ligand binding predictions, or automated computational chemistry pipelines. Provides cloud compute resources with no local setup required.
skills.desc_zh: 基於雲的量子化學平台，提供Python API，適合計算化學工作流程，包括pKa預測、幾何優化、構象搜索、分子性質計算、蛋白質-配體對接（AutoDock Vina）和AI蛋白質共摺疊（Chai-1、Boltz-1/2）。當任務涉及量子化學計算、分子性質預測、DFT或半經驗方法、神經網絡勢（AIMNet2）、蛋白質-配體結合預測或自動化計算化學管道時使用。提供雲計算資源，無需本地設置。

skills.name: scanpy
skills.desc_en: Standard single-cell RNA-seq analysis pipeline. Use for QC, normalization, dimensionality reduction (PCA/UMAP/t-SNE), clustering, differential expression, and visualization. Best for exploratory scRNA-seq analysis with established workflows. For deep learning models use scvi-tools; for data format questions use anndata.
skills.desc_zh: 標準的單細胞RNA-seq分析管道，適用於質量控制、標準化、降維（PCA/UMAP/t-SNE）、聚類、差異表達和可視化。最適合具有既定工作流程的探索性scRNA-seq分析。對於深度學習模型，使用scvi-tools；對於數據格式問題，使用anndata。

skills.name: scholar-evaluation
skills.desc_en: Systematically evaluate scholarly work using the ScholarEval framework, providing structured assessment across research quality dimensions including problem formulation, methodology, analysis, and writing with quantitative scoring and actionable feedback.
skills.desc_zh: 使用ScholarEval框架系統性評估學術工作，提供跨研究質量維度的結構化評估，包括問題形成、方法論、分析和寫作，並提供量化評分和可行的反饋。

skills.name: scientific-brainstorming
skills.desc_en: Creative research ideation and exploration. Use for open-ended brainstorming sessions, exploring interdisciplinary connections, challenging assumptions, or identifying research gaps. Best for early-stage research planning when you do not have specific observations yet. For formulating testable hypotheses from data use hypothesis-generation.
skills.desc_zh: 創意研究構思和探索，適用於開放式頭腦風暴會議、探索跨學科聯繫、挑戰假設或識別研究空白。最適合在尚未有具體觀察的早期研究規劃中使用。對於從數據中形成可測試的假設，使用hypothesis-generation。

skills.name: scientific-critical-thinking
skills.desc_en: Evaluate scientific claims and evidence quality. Use for assessing experimental design validity, identifying biases and confounders, applying evidence grading frameworks (GRADE, Cochrane Risk of Bias), or teaching critical analysis. Best for understanding evidence quality, identifying flaws. For formal peer review writing use peer-review.
skills.desc_zh: 評估科學主張和證據質量，適用於評估實驗設計的有效性、識別偏見和混淆因素、應用證據評分框架（GRADE、Cochrane風險偏見），或教授批判性分析。最適合理解證據質量和識別缺陷。對於正式的同行評審寫作，使用peer-review。

skills.name: scientific-schematics
skills.desc_en: Create publication-quality scientific diagrams using Nano Banana 2 AI with smart iterative refinement. Uses Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview for quality review. Only regenerates if quality is below threshold for your document type. Specialized in neural network architectures, system diagrams, flowcharts, biological pathways, and complex scientific visualizations.
skills.desc_zh: 使用Nano Banana 2 AI創建出版質量的科學圖表，並進行智能迭代精煉。使用Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview進行質量審查。僅在質量低於您文件類型的閾值時重新生成。專注於神經網絡架構、系統圖、流程圖、生物通路和複雜的科學可視化。

skills.name: scientific-slides
skills.desc_en: Build slide decks and presentations for research talks. Use this for making PowerPoint slides, conference presentations, seminar talks, research presentations, thesis defense slides, or any scientific talk. Provides slide structure, design templates, timing guidance, and visual validation. Works with PowerPoint and LaTeX Beamer.
skills.desc_zh: 為研究報告構建幻燈片和演示文稿，適用於製作PowerPoint幻燈片、會議演示、研討會講座、研究報告、論文答辯幻燈片或任何科學講座。提供幻燈片結構、設計模板、時間指導和視覺驗證，支持PowerPoint和LaTeX Beamer。

skills.name: scientific-visualization
skills.desc_en: Meta-skill for publication-ready figures. Use when creating journal submission figures requiring multi-panel layouts, significance annotations, error bars, colorblind-safe palettes, and specific journal formatting (Nature, Science, Cell). Orchestrates matplotlib/seaborn/plotly with publication styles. For quick exploration use seaborn or plotly directly.
skills.desc_zh: 出版準備圖形的元技能，適用於創建需要多面板佈局、顯著性註釋、誤差條、色盲安全調色板和特定期刊格式（Nature、Science、Cell）的期刊提交圖形。協調matplotlib/seaborn/plotly與出版風格。對於快速探索，直接使用seaborn或plotly。

skills.name: scientific-writing
skills.desc_en: Core skill for the deep research and writing tool. Write scientific manuscripts in full paragraphs (never bullet points). Use two-stage process with (1) section outlines with key points using research-lookup then (2) convert to flowing prose. IMRAD structure, citations (APA/AMA/Vancouver), figures/tables, reporting guidelines (CONSORT/STROBE/PRISMA), for research papers and journal submissions.
skills.desc_zh: 深度研究和寫作工具的核心技能，撰寫完整段落的科學手稿（絕不使用項目符號）。使用兩階段過程，首先使用research-lookup進行（1）部分大綱和關鍵點，然後（2）轉換為流暢的散文。IMRAD結構、引用（APA/AMA/Vancouver）、圖表、報告指南（CONSORT/STROBE/PRISMA），適用於研究論文和期刊提交。

skills.name: scikit-bio
skills.desc_en: Biological data toolkit. Sequence analysis, alignments, phylogenetic trees, diversity metrics (alpha/beta, UniFrac), ordination (PCoA), PERMANOVA, FASTA/Newick I/O, for microbiome analysis.
skills.desc_zh: 生物數據工具包，支持序列分析、比對、系統發育樹、多樣性指標（alpha/beta、UniFrac）、排序（PCoA）、PERMANOVA、FASTA/Newick I/O，適用於微生物組分析。

skills.name: scikit-learn
skills.desc_en: Machine learning in Python with scikit-learn. Use when working with supervised learning (classification, regression), unsupervised learning (clustering, dimensionality reduction), model evaluation, hyperparameter tuning, preprocessing, or building ML pipelines. Provides comprehensive reference documentation for algorithms, preprocessing techniques, pipelines, and best practices.
skills.desc_zh: 使用scikit-learn進行Python中的機器學習，適用於監督學習（分類、回歸）、非監督學習（聚類、降維）、模型評估、超參數調整、預處理或構建機器學習管道。提供全面的算法、預處理技術、管道和最佳實踐的參考文檔。

skills.name: scikit-survival
skills.desc_en: Comprehensive toolkit for survival analysis and time-to-event modeling in Python using scikit-survival. Use this skill when working with censored survival data, performing time-to-event analysis, fitting Cox models, Random Survival Forests, Gradient Boosting models, or Survival SVMs, evaluating survival predictions with concordance index or Brier score, handling competing risks, or implementing any survival analysis workflow with the scikit-survival library.
skills.desc_zh: 使用scikit-survival進行生存分析和事件時間建模的綜合工具包，適用於處理被截斷的生存數據、執行事件時間分析、擬合Cox模型、隨機生存森林、梯度提升模型或生存支持向量機，評估生存預測的協調指數或Brier分數，處理競爭風險，或實施任何生存分析工作流程。

skills.name: scvelo
skills.desc_en: RNA velocity analysis with scVelo. Estimate cell state transitions from unspliced/spliced mRNA dynamics, infer trajectory directions, compute latent time, and identify driver genes in single-cell RNA-seq data. Complements Scanpy/scVI-tools for trajectory inference.
skills.desc_zh: 使用scVelo進行RNA速度分析，從未剪接/剪接的mRNA動態中估計細胞狀態轉變，推斷軌跡方向、計算潛在時間，並在單細胞RNA-seq數據中識別驅動基因。補充Scanpy/scVI-tools進行軌跡推斷。

skills.name: scvi-tools
skills.desc_en: Deep generative models for single-cell omics. Use when you need probabilistic batch correction (scVI), transfer learning, differential expression with uncertainty, or multi-modal integration (TOTALVI, MultiVI). Best for advanced modeling, batch effects, multimodal data. For standard analysis pipelines use scanpy.
skills.desc_zh: 用於單細胞組學的深度生成模型，當需要概率批次校正（scVI）、轉移學習、帶不確定性的差異表達或多模態整合（TOTALVI、MultiVI）時使用。最適合進階建模、批次效應和多模態數據。對於標準分析管道，使用scanpy。

skills.name: seaborn
skills.desc_en: Statistical visualization with pandas integration. Use for quick exploration of distributions, relationships, and categorical comparisons with attractive defaults. Best for box plots, violin plots, pair plots, heatmaps. Built on matplotlib. For interactive plots use plotly; for publication styling use scientific-visualization.
skills.desc_zh: 與pandas集成的統計可視化工具，適用於快速探索分佈、關係和類別比較，具有吸引人的默認設置。最適合箱形圖、小提琴圖、成對圖、熱圖。基於matplotlib構建。對於交互式圖，使用plotly；對於出版樣式，使用scientific-visualization。

skills.name: shap
skills.desc_en: Model interpretability and explainability using SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations). Use this skill when explaining machine learning model predictions, computing feature importance, generating SHAP plots (waterfall, beeswarm, bar, scatter, force, heatmap), debugging models, analyzing model bias or fairness, comparing models, or implementing explainable AI. Works with tree-based models (XGBoost, LightGBM, Random Forest), deep learning (TensorFlow, PyTorch), linear models, and any black-box model.
skills.desc_zh: 使用 SHAP（SHapley Additive exPlanations）進行模型解釋和可解釋性分析。當解釋機器學習模型預測、計算特徵重要性、生成 SHAP 圖（瀑布圖、蜜蜂雲圖、條形圖、散點圖、力圖、熱圖）、調試模型、分析模型偏見或公平性、比較模型或實現可解釋 AI 時使用此技能。適用於基於樹的模型（XGBoost、LightGBM、隨機森林）、深度學習（TensorFlow、PyTorch）、線性模型和任何黑箱模型。

skills.name: simpy
skills.desc_en: Process-based discrete-event simulation framework in Python. Use this skill when building simulations of systems with processes, queues, resources, and time-based events such as manufacturing systems, service operations, network traffic, logistics, or any system where entities interact with shared resources over time.
skills.desc_zh: 基於過程的離散事件模擬框架，使用 Python 實現。當構建具有過程、隊列、資源和基於時間事件的系統模擬時使用此技能，例如製造系統、服務操作、網絡流量、物流或任何實體隨時間與共享資源互動的系統。

skills.name: stable-baselines3
skills.desc_en: Production-ready reinforcement learning algorithms (PPO, SAC, DQN, TD3, DDPG, A2C) with scikit-learn-like API. Use for standard RL experiments, quick prototyping, and well-documented algorithm implementations. Best for single-agent RL with Gymnasium environments. For high-performance parallel training, multi-agent systems, or custom vectorized environments, use pufferlib instead.
skills.desc_zh: 生產就緒的強化學習算法（PPO、SAC、DQN、TD3、DDPG、A2C），具有類似 scikit-learn 的 API。用於標準 RL 實驗、快速原型設計和良好文檔的算法實現。最適合單代理 RL 與 Gymnasium 環境。對於高性能並行訓練、多代理系統或自定義向量化環境，請使用 pufferlib。

skills.name: statistical-analysis
skills.desc_en: Guided statistical analysis with test selection and reporting. Use when you need help choosing appropriate tests for your data, assumption checking, power analysis, and APA-formatted results. Best for academic research reporting, test selection guidance. For implementing specific models programmatically use statsmodels.
skills.desc_zh: 指導性的統計分析，包括測試選擇和報告。當您需要幫助選擇適合您數據的測試、檢查假設、進行功效分析和 APA 格式的結果時使用。最適合學術研究報告和測試選擇指導。要以編程方式實現特定模型，請使用 statsmodels。

skills.name: statsmodels
skills.desc_en: Statistical models library for Python. Use when you need specific model classes (OLS, GLM, mixed models, ARIMA) with detailed diagnostics, residuals, and inference. Best for econometrics, time series, rigorous inference with coefficient tables. For guided statistical test selection with APA reporting use statistical-analysis.
skills.desc_zh: Python 的統計模型庫。當您需要特定模型類別（OLS、GLM、混合模型、ARIMA）及詳細診斷、殘差和推斷時使用。最適合計量經濟學、時間序列和嚴謹的係數表推斷。要進行指導性的統計測試選擇並使用 APA 報告，請使用 statistical-analysis。

skills.name: string-database
skills.desc_en: Query STRING API for protein-protein interactions (59M proteins, 20B interactions). Network analysis, GO/KEGG enrichment, interaction discovery, 5000+ species, for systems biology.
skills.desc_zh: 查詢 STRING API 以獲取蛋白質-蛋白質相互作用（59M 蛋白質，20B 相互作用）。進行網絡分析、GO/KEGG 豐富性分析、相互作用發現，涵蓋 5000 多種物種，適用於系統生物學。

skills.name: sympy
skills.desc_en: Use this skill when working with symbolic mathematics in Python. This skill should be used for symbolic computation tasks including solving equations algebraically, performing calculus operations (derivatives, integrals, limits), manipulating algebraic expressions, working with matrices symbolically, physics calculations, number theory problems, geometry computations, and generating executable code from mathematical expressions. Apply this skill when the user needs exact symbolic results rather than numerical approximations, or when working with mathematical formulas that contain variables and parameters.
skills.desc_zh: 在 Python 中處理符號數學時使用此技能。此技能應用於符號計算任務，包括代數解方程、執行微積分操作（導數、積分、極限）、操作代數表達式、符號處理矩陣、物理計算、數論問題、幾何計算，以及從數學表達式生成可執行代碼。當用戶需要精確的符號結果而非數值近似，或在處理包含變量和參數的數學公式時應用此技能。

skills.name: tiledbvcf
skills.desc_en: Efficient storage and retrieval of genomic variant data using TileDB. Scalable VCF/BCF ingestion, incremental sample addition, compressed storage, parallel queries, and export capabilities for population genomics.
skills.desc_zh: 使用 TileDB 高效存儲和檢索基因組變異數據。可擴展的 VCF/BCF 輸入、增量樣本添加、壓縮存儲、並行查詢和人口基因組學的導出能力。

skills.name: timesfm-forecasting
skills.desc_en: Zero-shot time series forecasting with Google's TimesFM foundation model. Use for any univariate time series (sales, sensors, energy, vitals, weather) without training a custom model. Supports CSV/DataFrame/array inputs with point forecasts and prediction intervals. Includes a preflight system checker script to verify RAM/GPU before first use.
skills.desc_zh: 使用 Google 的 TimesFM 基礎模型進行零樣本時間序列預測。用於任何單變量時間序列（銷售、傳感器、能源、生命體徵、天氣），無需訓練自定義模型。支持 CSV/DataFrame/數組輸入，提供點預測和預測區間。包括一個預檢查系統檢查腳本，以在首次使用前驗證 RAM/GPU。

skills.name: torch-geometric
skills.desc_en: Graph Neural Networks (PyG). Node/graph classification, link prediction, GCN, GAT, GraphSAGE, heterogeneous graphs, molecular property prediction, for geometric deep learning.
skills.desc_zh: 圖神經網絡（PyG）。用於節點/圖分類、鏈接預測、GCN、GAT、GraphSAGE、異質圖、分子性質預測，適用於幾何深度學習。

skills.name: torchdrug
skills.desc_en: PyTorch-native graph neural networks for molecules and proteins. Use when building custom GNN architectures for drug discovery, protein modeling, or knowledge graph reasoning. Best for custom model development, protein property prediction, retrosynthesis. For pre-trained models and diverse featurizers use deepchem; for benchmark datasets use pytdc.
skills.desc_zh: PyTorch 原生的圖神經網絡，用於分子和蛋白質。當構建自定義 GNN 架構以進行藥物發現、蛋白質建模或知識圖推理時使用。最適合自定義模型開發、蛋白質性質預測和逆合成。對於預訓練模型和多樣的特徵提取器，請使用 deepchem；對於基準數據集，請使用 pytdc。

skills.name: transformers
skills.desc_en: This skill should be used when working with pre-trained transformer models for natural language processing, computer vision, audio, or multimodal tasks. Use for text generation, classification, question answering, translation, summarization, image classification, object detection, speech recognition, and fine-tuning models on custom datasets.
skills.desc_zh: 在處理用於自然語言處理、計算機視覺、音頻或多模態任務的預訓練變壓器模型時使用此技能。用於文本生成、分類、問題回答、翻譯、摘要、圖像分類、物體檢測、語音識別，以及在自定義數據集上微調模型。

skills.name: treatment-plans
skills.desc_en: Generate concise (3-4 page), focused medical treatment plans in LaTeX/PDF format for all clinical specialties. Supports general medical treatment, rehabilitation therapy, mental health care, chronic disease management, perioperative care, and pain management. Includes SMART goal frameworks, evidence-based interventions with minimal text citations, regulatory compliance (HIPAA), and professional formatting. Prioritizes brevity and clinical actionability.
skills.desc_zh: 生成簡明（3-4 頁）、專注的醫療治療計劃，格式為 LaTeX/PDF，適用於所有臨床專科。支持一般醫療治療、康復療法、心理健康護理、慢性病管理、圍手術護理和疼痛管理。包括 SMART 目標框架、基於證據的干預措施，並附有最少的文本引用，符合規範（HIPAA）和專業格式。優先考慮簡潔性和臨床可行性。

skills.name: umap-learn
skills.desc_en: UMAP dimensionality reduction. Fast nonlinear manifold learning for 2D/3D visualization, clustering preprocessing (HDBSCAN), supervised/parametric UMAP, for high-dimensional data.
skills.desc_zh: UMAP 降維。快速非線性流形學習，用於 2D/3D 可視化、聚類預處理（HDBSCAN）、監督/參數 UMAP，適用於高維數據。

skills.name: uniprot-database
skills.desc_en: Direct REST API access to UniProt. Protein searches, FASTA retrieval, ID mapping, Swiss-Prot/TrEMBL. For Python workflows with multiple databases, prefer bioservices (unified interface to 40+ services). Use this for direct HTTP/REST work or UniProt-specific control.
skills.desc_zh: 直接訪問 UniProt 的 REST API。進行蛋白質搜索、FASTA 檢索、ID 映射、Swiss-Prot/TrEMBL。對於涉及多個數據庫的 Python 工作流程，建議使用 bioservices（統一接口，支持 40 多個服務）。用於直接的 HTTP/REST 工作或 UniProt 特定控制。

skills.name: usfiscaldata
skills.desc_en: Query the U.S. Treasury Fiscal Data API for federal financial data including national debt, government spending, revenue, interest rates, exchange rates, and savings bonds. Access 54 datasets and 182 data tables with no API key required. Use when working with U.S. federal fiscal data, national debt tracking (Debt to the Penny), Daily Treasury Statements, Monthly Treasury Statements, Treasury securities auctions, interest rates on Treasury securities, foreign exchange rates, savings bonds, or any U.S. government financial statistics.
skills.desc_zh: 查詢美國財政部財政數據 API，以獲取聯邦財務數據，包括國家債務、政府支出、收入、利率、匯率和儲蓄債券。訪問 54 個數據集和 182 個數據表，無需 API 密鑰。當處理美國聯邦財政數據、國家債務跟踪（精確到分）、每日財政報表、每月財政報表、財政證券拍賣、財政證券利率、外匯匯率、儲蓄債券或任何美國政府財務統計時使用。

skills.name: uspto-database
skills.desc_en: Access USPTO APIs for patent/trademark searches, examination history (PEDS), assignments, citations, office actions, TSDR, for IP analysis and prior art searches.
skills.desc_zh: 訪問 USPTO API 以進行專利/商標搜索、審查歷史（PEDS）、轉讓、引用、辦公行動、TSDR，適用於知識產權分析和先前技術搜索。

skills.name: vaex
skills.desc_en: Use this skill for processing and analyzing large tabular datasets (billions of rows) that exceed available RAM. Vaex excels at out-of-core DataFrame operations, lazy evaluation, fast aggregations, efficient visualization of big data, and machine learning on large datasets. Apply when users need to work with large CSV/HDF5/Arrow/Parquet files, perform fast statistics on massive datasets, create visualizations of big data, or build ML pipelines that do not fit in memory.
skills.desc_zh: 使用此技能處理和分析超過可用 RAM 的大型表格數據集（數十億行）。Vaex 在超出核心的 DataFrame 操作、延遲評估、快速聚合、大數據的高效可視化和大型數據集上的機器學習方面表現出色。當用戶需要處理大型 CSV/HDF5/Arrow/Parquet 文件、在龐大數據集上執行快速統計、創建大數據的可視化或構建不適合內存的機器學習管道時應用此技能。

skills.name: venue-templates
skills.desc_en: Access comprehensive LaTeX templates, formatting requirements, and submission guidelines for major scientific publication venues (Nature, Science, PLOS, IEEE, ACM), academic conferences (NeurIPS, ICML, CVPR, CHI), research posters, and grant proposals (NSF, NIH, DOE, DARPA). This skill should be used when preparing manuscripts for journal submission, conference papers, research posters, or grant proposals and need venue-specific formatting requirements and templates.
skills.desc_zh: 訪問主要科學出版場所（Nature、Science、PLOS、IEEE、ACM）、學術會議（NeurIPS、ICML、CVPR、CHI）、研究海報和資助提案（NSF、NIH、DOE、DARPA）的全面 LaTeX 模板、格式要求和提交指南。當準備期刊提交的手稿、會議論文、研究海報或資助提案時，並需要特定於場所的格式要求和模板時使用此技能。

skills.name: what-if-oracle
skills.desc_en: Run structured What-If scenario analysis with multi-branch possibility exploration. Use this skill when the user asks speculative questions like "what if...", "what would happen if...", "what are the possibilities", "explore scenarios", "scenario analysis", "possibility space", "what could go wrong", "best case / worst case", "risk analysis", "contingency planning", "strategic options", or any question about uncertain futures. Also trigger when the user faces a fork-in-the-road decision, wants to stress-test an idea, or needs to think through consequences before committing.
skills.desc_zh: 運行結構化的 What-If 情境分析，探索多分支可能性。當用戶提出推測性問題，如「如果...」、「如果會發生什麼...」、「可能性是什麼」、「探索情境」、「情境分析」、「可能性空間」、「可能出錯的地方」、「最佳情況/最壞情況」、「風險分析」、「應急計劃」、「戰略選擇」或任何關於不確定未來的問題時使用此技能。當用戶面臨抉擇、想要對一個想法進行壓力測試或需要在承諾之前考慮後果時，也會觸發此技能。

skills.name: xlsx
skills.desc_en: "Use this skill any time a spreadsheet file is the primary input or output. This means any task where the user wants to: open, read, edit, or fix an existing .xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, or .tsv file (e.g., adding columns, computing formulas, formatting, charting, cleaning messy data); create a new spreadsheet from scratch or from other data sources; or convert between tabular file formats. Trigger especially when the user references a spreadsheet file by name or path — even casually (like \"the xlsx in my downloads\") — and wants something done to it or produced from it. Also trigger for cleaning or restructuring messy tabular data files (malformed rows, misplaced headers, junk data) into proper spreadsheets. The deliverable must be a spreadsheet file. Do NOT trigger when the primary deliverable is a Word document, HTML report, standalone Python script, database pipeline, or Google Sheets API integration, even if tabular data is involved."
skills.desc_zh: 每當電子表格文件是主要輸入或輸出時使用此技能。這意味著任何用戶想要打開、閱讀、編輯或修復現有的 .xlsx、.xlsm、.csv 或 .tsv 文件（例如，添加列、計算公式、格式化、製作圖表、清理雜亂數據）；從頭開始或從其他數據源創建新的電子表格；或在表格文件格式之間進行轉換時。當用戶提到電子表格文件的名稱或路徑時，即使是隨意提及（如「我下載中的 xlsx」），並希望對其進行某些操作或生成某些內容時，也會觸發此技能。還會觸發清理或重構雜亂的表格數據文件（格式錯誤的行、錯位的標題、垃圾數據）為適當的電子表格。交付物必須是電子表格文件。當主要交付物是 Word 文檔、HTML 報告、獨立 Python 腳本、數據庫管道或 Google Sheets API 集成時，即使涉及表格數據，也不要觸發。

skills.name: zarr-python
skills.desc_en: Chunked N-D arrays for cloud storage. Compressed arrays, parallel I/O, S3/GCS integration, NumPy/Dask/Xarray compatible, for large-scale scientific computing pipelines.
skills.desc_zh: 用於雲存儲的分塊 N-D 數組。壓縮數組、並行 I/O、S3/GCS 集成，與 NumPy/Dask/Xarray 兼容，適用於大規模科學計算管道。

skills.name: zinc-database
skills.desc_en: Access ZINC (230M+ purchasable compounds). Search by ZINC ID/SMILES, similarity searches, 3D-ready structures for docking, analog discovery, for virtual screening and drug discovery.
skills.desc_zh: 訪問 ZINC（230M+ 可購買化合物）。通過 ZINC ID/SMILES 進行搜索、相似性搜索、用於對接的 3D 準備結構、類似物發現，適用於虛擬篩選和藥物發現。
